label: 2023 La Vuelta Ciclista a Espana Stage 10

extraction.one_line_summary: GANNA Filippo won the 25.8km Valladolid ITT at 56kph, beating world champion EVENEPOEL by 16 seconds while SEPU'LVEDA Jes's defended red jersey by reduced margin.
tactical_patterns: GANNA caught multiple minute-men sequentially, extending time gaps at each split from 30s to 53s, indicating perfect pacing execution.
ROGLIC committed excessively through corners requiring multiple checks, sacrificing 36s to GANNA suggesting desperation versus calculated GC racing.
UAE transformed team TT capability with AYUSO placing fourth at 50s, signaling depth beyond POGACAR for stage race support.
EVENEPOEL placed second despite carrying accumulated fatigue from GC defense, only 16s down after weeks of racing pressure.

rider_signals.GANNA Filippo: positive: 56kph average on technical course with one 7% climb reveals peak form, not just flat power specialist
rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: neutral: 16s loss acceptable given accumulated GC workload, but gap closing to specialist suggests fatigue accumulating
rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: negative: 1:18 down in seventh shows busy season weighing on form, concerning for GC ambitions in final week
rider_signals.SEPULVEDA Jesus: positive: TT performance exceeded expectations for non-specialist, retaining red suggests mental resilience under unexpected pressure
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: negative: desperate corner tactics losing 36s indicates anxiety about GC position rather than controlled racing
rider_signals.AYUSO Juan: positive: fourth at 50s demonstrates UE team depth, potential super-domestique or protected co-leader capability
